stories.title: World Cup Daily: Spain score twice to defeat Franc...
stories.summary: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the 2026 World Cup as we saw Spain defeat France to become the tournament's first finalist.

stories.title: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
stories.summary: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

stories.title: Texans co-founder Janice McNair dies at age 89
stories.summary: Texans co-founder and senior chair Janice S. McNair died Tuesday in Houston at age 89, the team said.

stories.title: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
stories.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

stories.title: Police investigation of Jets' Smith no longer acti...
stories.summary: An investigation of Geno Smith for an incident in which a woman accused him of battery last month is no longer active, and the New York Jets quarterback will not be charged.
